title: Right-side service lane narrows during handoff traffic
summary: In the real CCTV clip, staff circulation between the prep island, counter, and right-side service corridor overlaps with customer waiting near pickup. The middle window shows the strongest congestion and obstruction signal, consistent with a narrow lane rather than a staffing shortage.

evidence.summary: Opening window is moderate but already has 3 staff/customer crossings around the handoff edge.
Middle window peaks at 6 crossings, 17s of queue obstruction, and 0.73 congestion score in the right-side lane.
Later window remains elevated with 5 crossings and a 1.5 detour score, so the choke persists after the first rush.
